tweets.full_text: POV how mfs start moving after switching from ChatGPT to Claude
tweets.summary_zh: 从 ChatGPT 切换到 Claude 之后人的状态变化（搞笑视频）

tweets.full_text: BREAKING: SUPER MICRO CO-FOUNDER ARRESTED FOR SMUGGLING $2.5B IN NVIDIA GPUs TO CHINA
tweets.summary_zh: 突发：超微电脑联合创始人因向中国走私价值25亿美元的NVIDIA GPU被逮捕，持有4.64亿美元SMCI股票

tweets.full_text: Congrats to the @cursor_ai team on the launch of Composer 2! We are proud to see Kimi-k2.5 provide the foundation.
tweets.summary_zh: 祝贺 Cursor 团队发布 Composer 2！Kimi K2.5 为其提供了基础模型，很高兴看到开源模型生态的合作

tweets.full_text: Hey ChatGPT, help me write a prompt for Claude.
tweets.summary_zh: 用 ChatGPT 来写给 Claude 的提示词（讽刺 AI 工具互相调用的现象）

tweets.full_text: Projects are now available in Cowork. Keep your tasks and context in one place, focused on one area of work. Files and instructions stay on your computer. Import existing projects in one click, or start fresh.
tweets.summary_zh: Claude Cowork 现已支持 Projects 功能：可将任务和上下文集中管理，文件和指令保存在本地，支持一键导入已有项目
ChatGPT 搞笑使用场景合集（图片/视频）

tweets.full_text: We're launching a brand new, full-stack vibe coding experience in Google AI Studio, made possible by integrations with the Antigravity coding agent and Firebase backends.
tweets.summary_zh: Google AI Studio 推出全栈 vibe coding 体验，集成 Antigravity 编程 Agent 和 Firebase 后端，支持创建复杂的多人协作应用

tweets.full_text: this guy has 29 models on huggingface at page 2 ranking. no lab behind him. no sponsorship. $2,000 from his own pocket on GPU rentals.
tweets.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者自掏2000美元租GPU，在HuggingFace上发布了29个模型并进入排行榜前列，压缩GLM-4.7可在MacBook上运行，全部免费开源
热门 AI 梗图/视频（媒体内容）

tweets.full_text: 全人類これだけで月60万いけるわ
tweets.summary_zh: 光靠这个（AI工具）全人类都能月入60万日元

tweets.full_text: Composer 2 is now available in Cursor.

We've reached an agreement to acquire Astral. After we close, OpenAI plans for Astral to join our Codex team, with a continued focus on building great tools and advancing the shared mission of making developers more productive.
tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布收购 Astral，将并入 Codex 团队，继续专注于构建开发者工具、提升开发者生产力

tweets.full_text: NEWS: Cursor's $50B in-house model is literally Kimi K2.5 with RL on top. Got caught in 24 hours
tweets.summary_zh: Cursor 估值500亿的"自研模型"实际上是 Kimi K2.5 加了强化学习微调，24小时内就被发现了

tweets.full_text: JUST IN: Super Micro Computer $SMCI crashes 27% after its co-founder was charged with smuggling $2.5 billion worth of Nvidia AI chips to China.
tweets.summary_zh: 超微电脑股价暴跌27%，因其联合创始人被指控向中国走私价值25亿美元的NVIDIA AI芯片

tweets.full_text: was messing with the OpenAI base URL in Cursor and caught this: accounts/anysphere/models/kimi-k2p5-rl-0317-s515-fast. so composer 2 is just Kimi K2.5 with RL
tweets.summary_zh: 有人在 Cursor 的 OpenAI base URL 中发现模型ID为 kimi-k2p5-rl，证实 Composer 2 底层就是 Kimi K2.5 加强化学习

tweets.full_text: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang in new interview on orbital datacenters: The challenge of course is that cooling, you can't take advantage of conduction and convection, so you can only use radiation
tweets.summary_zh: NVIDIA CEO 黄仁勋谈太空轨道数据中心：最大挑战是散热只能靠辐射，需要很大的散热面积，但并非不可能实现
